name: claude-code-ios-dev-guide
description: A comprehensive guide (README only) for setting up Claude Code CLI with PRD-driven workflows, extended thinking (ultrathink), planning modes, XcodeBuildMCP integration, custom slash commands, subagents, and hooks optimized for Swift/SwiftUI iOS development.

findings_summary.notes: This repository contains only a single README.md file. There is no SKILL.md, no hooks, no scripts, and no plugin manifest. It is purely a documentation/guide resource for iOS developers who want to use Claude Code with Swift/SwiftUI workflows. The README is detailed and well-organized, covering: installation, configuration hierarchy, CLAUDE.md setup patterns, PRD-driven development, extended thinking, XcodeBuildMCP integration, slash commands, subagents, output styles, the plugins system, sandbox mode, settings/permissions, hooks for Swift (swift format, SwiftLint), and complete project structure examples. The guide includes example configuration snippets, hook scripts (referenced inline as shell examples), and best practices. No actual executable code is present in the repo. No license declared. The star count (384) reflects the documentation value. Categorized as 'info' risk since there is nothing to execute — it is a reference guide only. Score reflects that it is not a deployable skill but a valuable reference document.
